title: taraxacum clitolobum
intro: Taraxacum clitolobum, also known as the crested dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Taraxacum clitolobum include its potential to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Taraxacum clitolobum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
